text:
to locate the information you need, please contact ResDAC.
CCW Record Layout - Medicaid Enrollee Supplemental File (MESF): National Death Index (NDI)
| SAS Name | Variable Name | 
|---|---|
| BENE_ID | Encrypted 723 Beneficiary ID (Unique Key) | 
| STATE_CD | State Code (MESF) | 
| MSIS_ID | Encrypted Medicaid State ID Number | 
| REF_YR | Record Reference Year | 
| DM_SOURCE | Dual or Medicaid only enrollee | 
| DEATH_DT | Date of Death | 
| NDI_DOD | NDI Date of Death | 
| NDI_MATCH | Death
